TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andrew_Bogut, title = Andrew_Bogut, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrew_Bogut} }

S.FORM: == Andrew Bogut == Andrew Bogut hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 11, Andrew Bogut, squliq na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya 1970 kawas hiya yaba ru yaya nya aring Croatia musa maki Australia. Bogut aring mrkyas smoya balay mzyuwi mari musa sakang' pspung mari. Jessica ga Bogut nya,maki sazing mlikuy laqi nya Luka ru Nikola. pinqbaqan nya Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa St John's Regional pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa Lake Ginninderra pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Utah pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Andrew Bogut maki msqun ki Jessica, tehuk misuw qani. maki 2 la'iy. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 1984 kawas htagan beh sa Bogut ga,maki mongab'un.

== Andrew Bogut == Andrew Bogut hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 11, Andrew Bogut, squliq na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya 1970 kawas hiya yaba ru yaya nya aring Croatia musa maki Australia. Bogut aring mrkyas smoya balay mzyuwi mari musa sakang' pspung mari. Jessica ga Bogut nya,maki sazing mlikuy laqi nya Luka ru Nikola. pinqbaqan nya Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa St John's Regional pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut mqwas biru sa Lake Ginninderra pqwsan biru seneng . Andrew Bogut, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Utah pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Andrew Bogut maki msqun ki Jessica, tehuk misuw qani. maki 2 la'iy. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 1984 kawas htagan beh sa Bogut ga,maki mongab'un.

ОІoЙЈut ariЕ‹ mrkjas~Й• s~Й•moja ОІalaj mzjuwi mari mus~Й•a s~Й•akaЕ‹К” ps~Й•puЕ‹ mari. *es~Й•s~Й•iК¦~КЁa ЙЈa ОІoЙЈut nja,maki s~Й•aziЕ‹ mlikuj laqi nja luka ru nikola. pinqОІaqan nja an*rew ОІoЙЈut mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a s~Й•t *oД§nК”s~Й• reЙЈional pqws~Й•an ОІiru s~Й•eneЕ‹ . an*rew ОІoЙЈut mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a lake ЙЈinnin*erra pqws~Й•an ОІiru s~Й•eneЕ‹ . an*rew ОІoЙЈut, tК”ariЕ‹ kawas~Й• taj **** teД§uk kawas~Й• taj ****, mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a utaД§ pqws~Й•an ОІiru kraД§u. qnxan nja an*rew ОІoЙЈut maki ms~Й•qun ki *es~Й•s~Й•iК¦~КЁa, teД§uk mis~Й•uw qani. maki * laК”ij. pinК¦~КЁjuwaЙЈan njaК” ps~Й•pЕ‹an mari s~Й•a maj juЙЈal jaК¦~КЁiЕ‹ mas~Й•uq ms~Й•puЕ‹ mari s~Й•a ps~Й•pЕ‹an mari na majК¦~КЁjuЙЈal ОІjaК¦~КЁiЕ‹ lЙЈa К¦~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oК¦~КЁiation plajers~Й• **** kawas~Й• Д§taЙЈan ОІeД§ s~Й•a ОІoЙЈut ЙЈa,maki moЕ‹aОІК”un.
